title: Elixir 'N' Tonics
description: Adds the elixir from the Legend of Zelda Breath of the Wild by replacing the potions.
body:
Adds the elixirs from the Legend of Zelda Breath of the Wild by replacing the potions. 

I'm not updating this anymore so if you want elixirs get the real breath of the wild one

Made by TurtleBear
